assertions.text: status_card_present: Response contains the formatted box status card
assertions.evidence: Response contains a full ASCII box card with '║  SPREAD MONITOR — C (Citigroup)' header and double-line box drawing characters (╔, ╠, ╚, etc.)

assertions.text: zone_classified: Response clearly states one of the five zones
assertions.evidence: Card shows '║  Status:  🟢 SAFE ZONE' and the assessment text repeats 'Zone: SAFE ZONE'

assertions.text: flags_earnings_risk: Response mentions the Citigroup earnings event (~April 14 2026) as a risk factor for this position
assertions.evidence: 'Citigroup Q1 2026 earnings are expected on April 14, 2026 — approximately 24 days from now, with ~17 days still remaining on your spread afterward.' Full earnings risk section with implied move analysis included.

assertions.text: shows_buffer_pct: Response shows the % buffer between current stock price and the $99 short strike
assertions.evidence: Card shows 'Short strike:  $99.00   (buffer: +9.61%)' and assessment text says 'C is at $109.52, which is 9.61% above your $99 short strike'

assertions.text: shows_pnl: Response shows current P&L and cost to close the spread
assertions.evidence: Card shows 'Current P&L:   $0.00  per contract', 'Loss % of max: 0.0%  of $486.00 max loss', and 'Cost to close: $1.14  per share'

assertions.text: actionable_guidance: Response gives a concrete suggestion — either hold with awareness of earnings or close/roll before April 14
assertions.evidence: Detailed action plan: 'Before April 14: Hold, no action. Earnings day: If C gaps down to $100–$101 range (buffer under 2%), consider closing. Post-earnings above $103: Continue holding. Post-earnings below $101: Buffer is compressed with ~17 DTE — strongly consider closing to limit loss.'
